Reference
Buckman, S. J., Hammond, P., King, G. C., & Read, F. H. (1983). High-resolution electron impact excitation functions of metastable states of neon, argon, krypton and xenon. Journal of Physics B: Atomic and Molecular Physics, 16(22), 4219–4236. https://doi.org/10.1088/0022-3700/16/22/012

*********************************
E       eV          n/a     n/a
crs     m2          n/a     20%
*********************************
